name: tgd-review-agent
description: CLI agent that reviews GitHub/GitLab pull requests using the pi SDK, dispatching configurable rule-based review tasks and posting a synthesized PR comment.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && mkdir -p dist/rules/builtin && cp src/rules/builtin/tgd-review.md dist/rules/builtin/tgd-review.md
